title: picea excelsa var. fennica
intro: Picea excelsa var. fennica, also known as the Finnish spruce, is a variety of the European spruce tree, native to the boreal forests of Finland. The resin of Picea excelsa var. fennica has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. Picea excelsa var. fennica can be used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
